rows.description: Periodic review of a customer account's health signals — engagement, usage, support load, financial posture. Produces a health report CSMs and AEs can skim ahead of a standing check-in.
Send emails from your agent email address with reply tracking. Use when the agent needs to send an email, reply, or follow up.

scripts.name: send_email
scripts.description: Send an email from the agent email address

rows.description: Create sub-threads, manage dependencies, update status, and query threads. Use when breaking work into subtasks, tracking progress, or managing task dependencies.

scripts.name: create_sub_thread
scripts.description: Create a sub-thread under the current or specified parent thread

scripts.name: add_dependency
scripts.description: Block a thread until another completes

scripts.name: update_thread_status
scripts.description: Update thread status, channel, title, description, priority, due date, and assignee. Use channel=TASK to promote a chat to a task.

scripts.name: add_comment
scripts.description: Add a comment to a thread

scripts.name: list_sub_threads
scripts.description: List sub-threads with optional status filter

scripts.name: get_thread_details
scripts.description: Get full thread details including comments and dependencies

scripts.name: escalate_thread
scripts.description: Escalate a thread to the supervisor agent

scripts.name: delegate_thread
scripts.description: Delegate a thread to another agent

scripts.name: promote_to_task
scripts.description: Promote the current thread to a task — sets channel to TASK with metadata

scripts.name: search_users
scripts.description: Search tenant users by name or email for task assignment

scripts.name: schedule_followup
scripts.description: Schedule a future agent wakeup to follow up on tasks or deadlines

scripts.name: present_form
scripts.description: Render a Question Card form for the user to fill out. Pass form_path (skill-relative, e.g. 'customer-onboarding/references/intake-form.json') and an optional prefill_json string with any values you can extract from the conversation. The user submits and the next user message contains a ```form_response fenced block with all values.

rows.description: Create and manage durable markdown-first artifacts. Use when the user asks to create a document, report, summary, or any persistent content.

scripts.name: create_artifact
scripts.description: Create a durable markdown artifact

scripts.name: update_artifact
scripts.description: Update an existing artifact

scripts.name: list_artifacts
scripts.description: List artifacts with optional filters

rows.description: Learnings loop for compositions. `compound_recall` retrieves prior observations scoped to (tenant, user, skill, optional subject) at run start; `compound_reflect` extracts up to 3 new observations from the completed run and stores them under the same scope. Paired — edit docstrings together.

scripts.name: compound_recall
scripts.description: Retrieve top-K prior learnings for this composition run (user-scoped before tenant-scoped).

scripts.name: compound_reflect
scripts.description: Extract up to 3 non-obvious observations from the completed run and store them under the composition's scope.

rows.description: Onboard a new customer by gathering information and creating tasks for the team. Handles intake questions, conditional task creation, user assignment, and deadline tracking.

Drive a new customer from deal-close to onboarded by continuously reconciling desired state against actual state. Invoked via webhook on opportunity-won and re-invoked on task completions. Never blocks waiting for human input — each tick reads current state, creates the tasks that are still missing, and exits. HITL happens between ticks, not inside a single invocation.

Restate a problem in a structured way before gathering data. Returns goal, constraints, known unknowns, and decision criteria so downstream steps have a clean target. Composition-only primitive — not intended for direct chat use.

Parallel fan-out primitive. Not a runnable skill on its own — compositions declare a parallel step and the composition runner executes the branches concurrently. This entry exists so admins can see gather in the catalog alongside the other composition primitives.
Read events, check availability, create tentative events via Google Calendar API. Use when the user asks about calendar, schedule, or availability.

scripts.name: gcal_list_events
scripts.description: List calendar events in a time range

scripts.name: gcal_get_event
scripts.description: Get full details of a calendar event

scripts.name: gcal_check_availability
scripts.description: Check free/busy status for a time range

scripts.name: gcal_create_event
scripts.description: Create a tentative calendar event

scripts.name: gcal_update_event
scripts.description: Update or confirm a calendar event

scripts.name: gcal_delete_event
scripts.description: Delete a calendar event

rows.description: Read inbox, triage messages, draft replies via Gmail API. Use when the user asks about email, inbox, or Gmail.

scripts.name: gmail_list_messages
scripts.description: List messages in the Gmail inbox

scripts.name: gmail_get_message
scripts.description: Get full details of a Gmail message

scripts.name: gmail_search_messages
scripts.description: Search Gmail with query syntax

scripts.name: gmail_modify_labels
scripts.description: Add or remove labels on a message (archive, mark read, etc)

scripts.name: gmail_create_draft
scripts.description: Create a Gmail draft (user reviews and sends)

rows.description: Collect intake details for a new external provider task via a Question Card form, then hand off to the external provider MCP's workflow_task_create tool. Use on user-created task threads where the external task hasn't been minted yet (sync_status='local').

Render a synthesis into a final deliverable using a named template. Deterministic — template substitution only, no LLM call at this step. Supported formats in v1 are sales_brief, health_report, and renewal_risk.

scripts.name: render_package
scripts.description: Render a synthesis dict into a Markdown deliverable using a named template.

rows.description: Prep a customer renewal conversation. Pulls contract terms, recent usage, support posture, renewal history, and win/loss signals, then renders a renewal_risk brief ordered by deal-impact likelihood.
Gather account context, financials, activity, and external signals for a sales meeting. Produces a packaged brief the rep can read in 60 seconds.

Reference template exercising the full AgentCore Code Sandbox path — pulls skill_runs from Thinkwork's GraphQL, summarises them with pandas via execute_code, and uploads a chart to S3 using the sandbox's per-tenant IAM role. Use for dogfood validation when onboarding a new tenant to the sandbox substrate.

scripts.name: run_pilot
scripts.description: Runs the sandbox-pilot flagship demo end-to-end.

rows.description: Chat intent router for composition skills. When the user asks for something that matches a registered composition (sales prep, account health review, renewal prep, etc.), call start_composition to kick off the run. Do NOT use this for single-tool skills — invoke those directly.

scripts.name: start_composition
scripts.description: Start a composition skill run for the current user with resolved inputs. Returns runId + status.

scripts.name: composition_status
scripts.description: Fetch the status of a previously-started composition run by runId. Returns status, started_at, finished_at, delivered_artifact_ref.

rows.description: End-to-end smoke for the composable-skill dispatch path. A one-step composition that calls the deterministic `package` script skill, no LLM, no external connectors. Exists solely so that a `/api/skills/start` + agentcore run → `skill_runs.status='complete'` transition can be proved end-to-end against the deployed stack.

Read a frame + gathered data (and optionally prior learnings) and produce a structured analysis — risks, opportunities, open questions, and talking points — that the package step will render into a deliverable. Composition-only primitive.

Search the web, read pages, and research companies. Provider-agnostic — backed by Exa or SerpAPI depending on tenant configuration. Use when the user needs current information, wants to look something up, or asks about a company.

scripts.name: web_search
scripts.description: Search the web for current information

scripts.name: web_read
scripts.description: Read the full text content of web pages

scripts.name: company_research
scripts.description: Research a company — profile, news, people, databases

notes: notify 1 tenant(s) (4 enabled rows) before rename or cutover

rows.description: Read, write, and list workspace memory files (S3-backed). Use when the agent needs to remember information between conversations.

scripts.name: workspace_memory_write
scripts.description: Write a structured note to workspace memory

scripts.name: workspace_memory_read
scripts.description: Read a file from workspace memory

scripts.name: workspace_memory_list
scripts.description: List all files in workspace memory
